name: konthai
description: konthai — reads deliberately obfuscated Thai (ภาษาวิบัติ) and gives you back standard Thai + English. Handles สก๊อย glyph-substitution, phonetic respelling, karaoke-romanized Thai, keyboard-layout collisions, the ภาษาลู cipher, RO-leet, gen-z slang, and คำผวน — on instinct, surfacing confidence and ambiguity honestly and flagging rather than faking when a span can't be cracked.
keywords: ภาษาวิบัติ

interface.shortDescription: Decodes obfuscated Thai (ภาษาวิบัติ) into standard Thai + English — honestly.
interface.longDescription: konthai reads deliberately mangled Thai — สก๊อย glyph-substitution, phonetic respelling, karaoke-romanized Thai, keyboard-layout collisions, the ภาษาลู cipher, RO-leet, gen-z slang, and คำผวน — and recovers standard Thai plus an English reading. It surfaces confidence and ambiguity honestly and flags rather than fabricates when a span can't be cracked.
defaultPrompt: What does this obfuscated Thai comment mean?
Decode this ภาษาลู into standard Thai.
Translate this mangled Thai social-media post.
